name: Puffco Pivot
summary: A pocket-sized electronic concentrate vaporiser for patients prescribed cannabis extracts on the move.
description: The Puffco Pivot brings electronic concentrate vaping into a pen-sized, pocketable form. It uses the same 3D chamber heating as the larger Peak, with four heat settings, an LED bar and haptic feedback so you know where you are without a screen. For patients prescribed extracts who want to medicate discreetly away from home, it is far easier than a torch-and-rig setup. The trade-off is capacity and filtration — it is built for quick, portable sessions rather than the smoother, larger draws of a full desktop rig.
